center.name: 開普省
center.summary: 開普省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括南非鸭、White-backed mousebird、Neddicky等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape bunting occurs in southern Africa from south-western Angola, eastern Zambia, Zimbabwe and southern Tanzania to the Cape

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: dexter at Pilanesberg, South Africa | image2 = Piping Cisticola (Cisticola fulvicapilla) (W1CDR0000367 BD18).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in Cape Province, South Africa | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Cisticola fulvicapilla | authority = (Vieillot, 1817) | synonyms = Cisticola fulvicapillus }} The neddicky, or piping cisticola (Cisticola fulvicapilla), is a small passerine bird in the family Cisticolidae, which is native to Africa, southwards of the equator

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is distributed in western and central regions of southern Africa from Namibia and southern Botswana eastwards to Central Transvaal and the eastern Cape

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The range of the blue-billed teal extends in Africa from Angola, Zambia, eastern Congo, Malawi, northern Mozambique, Tanzania, Kenya, Uganda, southern Ethiopia, Sudan and Madagascar. They are mainly found in tropical eastern Africa: Ethiopia to Cape Province, westward to northern Botswana and Namibia, and Madagascar. The blue-billed teal prefers habitats with abundant plants with floating leaves and fringe vegetation, including shallow fresh-water swamps, marshes, streams, shallow small lakes and ponds with fringed edges of reeds or papyrus. They are observed to spend the twilight and night hours dabbling in very shallow waters and move to deeper and safer parts of the marsh during daytime

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Poyser | location = London, UK | year = 2002 | pages = 544–547 | isbn = 978-0-7136-6514-7}} All sedge warblers spend winter in sub-Saharan Africa, from Senegal in the west to Ethiopia in the east, and as far south as the eastern Cape Province of South Africa and northern Namibia
